prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-WF-5INCHUTILITYKNIFE-STD-FBA Product Type: KITCHEN_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Stainless Steel and Wheat Fiber Handle Kitchen Knives (Many Styles) (Utility Knife) Description: Handle a wide range of kitchen cutting and slicing tasks with Beille’s 5 inch stainless steel and wheat fiber utility knife, designed for comfort, control, and clean, sustainable style.

Whether you’re slicing a sandwich, chopping herbs, trimming vegetables, or prepping a fruit salad, this utility knife offers the precision of a paring knife, but with added length for versatility. The high-quality stainless steel blade offers excellent edge retention and resists rust, stains, and corrosion, making it a long-lasting choice for any home kitchen. It glides effortlessly through a variety of ingredients and maintains its sharpness over time, even with frequent use, keeping your kitchen running efficiently.

The handle is crafted from durable wheat fiber, an alternative to traditional plastics, offering a lightweight yet sturdy grip that feels natural and comfortable when handling. Whether you're preparing fresh produce or portioning cheese, this utility knife bridges the gap between a chef's knife and a paring knife, giving you versatile performance in a compact form.

And, when the cooking’s done? Simply pop it in the dishwasher. This utility knife is dishwasher safe for quick and easy cleanup, making your kitchen routine even more convenient.

Beille’s utility knife is the go to for precision and control, when a larger blade is too bulky, and a smaller paring knife just isn't quite enough. Built for everyday performance with modern aesthetics and sustainability in mind, our 5 inch utility knife is one you’ll reach for again and again in your kitchen. Search Terms: utility knife; cheese slicer; stainless steel knife; meal food prep; sustainable products; wheat straw utensils; knife set; kitchen utensils set; tomato knife; multipurpose kitchen knife; eco conscious kitchen essentials; baking supplies; chef knife Features: - 5 INCH UTILITY KNIFE: A great all purpose knife that bridges the gap between a chef’s knife and paring knife; ideal for slicing fruits, vegetables, meats, and cheeses, making it perfect for everyday kitchen prep - WHEAT FIBER HANDLE: Crafted from a blend of sustainable wheat fiber and polypropylene, the lightweight handle offers a natural, textured grip that’s comfortable, ergonomic and better for the environment - STAINLESS STEEL BLADE: Built to last with a durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel blade that maintains its edge; designed for long lasting sharpness and performance; blade measures 5 inches in length - STYLISH AND MODERN DESIGN: Style and sustainability meet here! Sleek, sharp and stylish, this 5 inch utility knife adds a clean, natural look to any kitchen; balanced and easy to handle, reducing hand fatigue and improving control during detailed prep work - DISHWASHER SAFE: Designed for convenience, this utility knife is safe to clean in the dishwasher, making post meal clean up quick and hassle free === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 5 Inch Stainless Steel Utility Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Wheat Fiber Handle, Dishwasher Safe, Sustainable Design, Stainless Steel Blade, Ergonomic Grip

openai.title_differentiation: Wheat Fiber Handle, Dishwasher Safe, Corrosion Resistant Stainless Steel Blade, Lightweight Ergonomic Grip
